name: Omega Quiz
description: Open source realtime quiz for staff training. Self-hosted Node + WebSocket app.

NODE_ENV.description: Set to 'production' so the server enforces HTTPS redirect and HSTS.

HOST_TOKEN.description: Recovery token for the host role (used by the form login when no magic link is available). Generate with: node -e "console.log(require('crypto').randomBytes(32).toString('hex'))"

ADMIN_TOKEN.description: Recovery token for the admin role. Use a different value from HOST_TOKEN.

COOKIE_SECRET.description: HMAC key for session cookies. Generated automatically per boot if unset, but you want a stable value in production so sessions survive restarts.

PUBLIC_BASE_URL.description: Public URL the QR code and magic links should use (e.g. https://omegaquiz.example.com). Optional — also settable from the Branding tab in the admin UI.

DATA_DIR.description: Where config.json and questions.json are persisted. Point at a mounted volume so settings and questions survive restarts.

scripts.postdeploy: echo 'Deployed. Check the live logs for your magic-link sign-in URLs.'
